nasb.text: You shall make fifty clasps of gold, and join the curtains to one another with the clasps so that the tabernacle will be a unit.

esv.text: And you shall make fifty clasps of gold, and couple the curtains one to the other with the clasps, so that the tabernacle may be a single whole.

cnv.text: 你要做五十個金鉤，又要用鉤使幔子相連起來，成為一整個會幕。

ccb.text: 再做五十个金钩，把两幅大幔子连在一起，成为圣幕。
